title: Five More Minutes
lyrics:
[verse]
Sat down—can’t quit yet!
Five More Minutes!
Tower’s tall, don’t wreck it—
*clatter* Five More Minutes!
Spin it fast—keep it?
*whirrr* Really?
Five More Minutes!

[chorus]
Five more minutes!
Not done yet!
Five more minutes!
Pleeeease don’t— *sniffle*

[verse]
Chin’s clean, I licked it—
Five More Minutes!
Soup’s hot, I’ll fix it—
*pshhh* What?
Five More Minutes!
Fish looks sad, I’ll pet it—
*blub blub* Hmm?
Five More Minutes!

[chorus]
Five more minutes!
I’m winning now!
Five more minutes!
Just one more— *yawn*

[verse]
Knee’s scraped, I’ll fix it—
Five More Minutes!
Cousin’s here, I’ll hug it—
*giggle* Why?
Five More Minutes!
Not a baby—hush now—
*snore* …zZZ…
Five More— *thud*

[chorus]
Five more minutes…
*whisper* Not tired…
Five more… *snore*
…okay.
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, xylophone and gentle stomps, warm and fun, 110 BPM, singalong energy, gentle bass bounce, soft vocal not shouty, bedtime fun not daytime energy, cozy song you'd hum in bed
cover_description: Kid hugging a tower of blocks, clock hands spinning fast.
rhyme_family: in it, bin it, spin it, grin it, chin it, thin it, fin it, pin it, win it, begin it, skin it, kin it, dinner, winner, sin it, tin it, whiner, inner
